businessName: Novaliches General Hospital and Medical Center (NovaGen)

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive site, services & facilities overview, contact section, basic SEO, Netlify hosting setup
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial quotation sent 2026-07-17 via Laravel API to info@novagen.com.ph; auto follow-ups 1w enabled (max 4).

sources.address: 793 Quirino Highway, Brgy. Gulod, Novaliches, Quezon City 1117
sources.notes: Logo (1620x1620 JPEG) and cover photo (1773x657 PNG) downloaded HD via Chrome DevTools MCP inspect + in-page fetch()/base64 (fbcdn get_network_request file-save blocked by shared-session workspace roots, same limitation noted on prior clients). FB Photos tab is login-walled and only surfaces recent text-graphic health-tip posts (no real facility photos) when logged out — used official novagen.com.ph / About microsite copy for services, pricing, and brand story instead.

system.label: Appointments admin
system.painHero: CT scan, hemodialysis, and eye center bookings scattered on phone calls — run the OPD board so admissions sees the full queue.
